stateFile.description: Per-worktree workflow state file path (lives in the worktree gitdir).

prdsDir.description: Legacy PRD directory alias; defaults to docs/prds until planningDir cutover (R7).

tasksDir.description: Frozen task-list directory alias; defaults to prdsDir until migration cutover (R7).

doc.description: Documentation pipeline behavior after task-list freeze.

afterTasks.description: Doc→implementation boundary after /sw-tasks freeze: stop halts; confirm prompts before dispatch; auto dispatches the implementation loop.

delegation.description: Sub-agent dispatch policy gate mode for orchestrators and atomic commands.

mode.description: bind-only enforces model/intensity binding with delegate-by-default policy. default remains gated until Phase 2 live acceptance (DL-9).

orchestration.description: Cross-orchestrator plan-policy kill-switch (PRD 022 R29). Default canonical is byte-identical to today; proposed is fixture-only until PRD 023/024 adoption.

planPolicy.description: canonical = validated proposals must match canonical chain/waves; proposed = guideline latitude (kernel envelope unchanged). Recorded mode on persisted plans is honored on resume over live config.

phaseAckCadence.description: Pause for human acknowledgment after every K phase merges into <type>/<slug>. 0 = off.

baseBranchType.description: Optional override for phase-mode base branch type (<type>/<slug>). When omitted, resolved from release-please-config.json or task-list frontmatter.

remediation.description: Bounded auto-remediation before a blocked phase halts clean (R8/R11).

maxAttempts.description: Per-phase stabilize/remediation attempts before consolidated blocker halt.

watchdog.description: Driver liveness and per-phase timeout watchdog (R46).

phaseTimeoutMinutes.description: In-flight phase exceeds this duration → consolidated blocker.

autonomy.description: Conductor autonomy mode and run-level budgets (TR15, TR20 / R13, R42).

mode.description: autonomous = minimal legitimate-halt set (default hands-off); supervised adds per-phase acknowledgement halts.

maxRunMinutes.description: Run-level wall-clock ceiling; exceeded → clean consolidated halt (R42).

maxIterations.description: Run-level deliver-loop iteration ceiling; complements maxRunMinutes (R42).

terminal.description: Terminal path autonomy after all phases green-merged (PRD 013 A1 R24).

autonomy.description: auto runs retrospective → PR → watch/stabilize hands-off; supervised preserves halts.

drainMechanical.description: When true (default), deliver-loop drains mechanical actions in-process until awaitAgent, awaitInFlight, or halt. When false, one mechanical step per invocation.

autonomy.description: auto applies dry-run wouldRemove when merge is deterministic and safe; confirm preserves human ack.

compound.description: /sw-retrospective compounding autonomy (R10). Gates approval prompts only — never memory or rule-class safety.

autonomy.description: supervised preserves retro/compound approval and did-you-merge prompts; auto runs the pre-merge chain hands-off when the terminal PR is green but never bypasses fail-closed memory (R7) or rule-class human gates (R8).

configuredWith.description: Stamp written by /sw-init recording plugin + schema versions at configuration time (R32).

allowUnconfigured.description: When true, vacuous/placeholder verify commands do not hard-block under /sw-deliver or autonomous mode (R28/DL-13).

fullTest.description: Full verify command for CI, pre-merge, and widen-triggered post-merge.

watchdog.description: Wall-clock budget for full verify manifest loop (PRD 055 R31).

maxMinutes.description: Halt full verify with consolidated resume report when exceeded.

verifyE2e.description: Optional smoke/E2E verify adapter (providers/verify/). Runs only when enabled.

enabled.description: When true, /sw-verify invokes scripts/verify-e2e.py after static verify.* commands.

provider.description: Adapter id under providers/verify/<id>.py. Use "none" to skip.

routes.description: Optional affected routes hint for smoke scoping (adapter-specific).

review.description: AI code-review provider selection. Credentials are never stored here — use env/secret store at runtime.

provider.description: Active review adapter id (must match providers/review/<name>.md and providers/review/<name>.py). Use "none" to disable review gating. CodeRabbit is opt-in.

enabled.description: Deprecated — use review.provider:"none" instead. When false, review gating is disabled (gate state off, non-blocking). Equivalent to provider:"none".

local.description: Local multi-agent code review (phase 1 of /sw-review) before external provider.

enabled.description: When false, skip local review phase and proceed to external provider only.

provider.description: Local adapter id under providers/code-review/<id>.md. Use "none" to disable.

apply.description: Auto-apply policy for eligible local findings. surface = review only; off = disable apply.

enrich.description: Optional external design enrichment. Default off = native WCAG checklist only.

gate.description: Severity gate for validated local findings. Default rollout is surface-only (haltOn empty).

haltOn.description: Validated severities that halt /sw-ship. Empty = surface-only rollout.

providers.description: Ordered heterogeneous review adapter ids (supersedes scalar review.provider; scalar coerced to single-element array).

coderabbit.description: CodeRabbit-specific settings for the gate and review adapter. API keys are env-sourced only.

reviewGraceMinutes.description: Minutes after push before treating absent review signal as settled (gate grace window).

policy.description: Whether the gate evaluates all checks or required checks only.

treatNeutralAsPass.description: When true, NEUTRAL check conclusions count as pass unless the check name is on neutralAllowlist.

neutralAllowlist.description: Check names that remain blocking even when treatNeutralAsPass is true.

ci.description: Shipwright-CI-only settings (PRD 016/018). Not part of generic user verify.

prTestPlanManifest.description: Path to pr-test-plan.manifest.json for CI generator and check-gate (dev/plugin repos).

worktree.description: Per-work-item worktree scaffold and parallelism ceiling.

parallelCeiling.description: Max active worktrees before recombination is required.

scaffold.description: Opt-in web-app worktree scaffold (local ports/DB). Omit for non-web repos; defaults apply only when set (PRD 018 R15).

intraPhase.description: Within-phase Task fan-out budget (PRD 023 R15). Does not consume wave ceiling slots.

parallelBudget.description: Max concurrent intra-phase Task workers per phase executor.

harnessLimit.description: Platform active-subagent ceiling for global cap accounting.

memory.description: Durable memory provider selection and project binding. API credentials are env-sourced only.

provider.description: Active memory adapter id (must match providers/<name>.md and providers/<name>-rules.py).

sourceOfTruth.description: Authoritative store for decision-class records. auto derives from provider (external→memory, in-repo/none→repo).

inRepo.description: In-repo markdown store settings (when memory.provider is in-repo).

storeDir.description: Committed store root (memories/ and rules/ live beneath).

commitMode.description: Where non-rule memories write. Rule-class files are always committed under storeDir/rules/.

project.description: Memory project scope key (e.g. repo name).

connection.description: Non-secret connection hints. For recallium, restBaseUrl points at the local REST API.

autoSync.description: Controls the stop hook that schedules /sw-memory-sync distillation runs.

enforceBeforeSubmit.description: When false, beforeSubmitPrompt guardrail enforcement is disabled for this repo.

requireRuleClass.description: When true, block until at least one allowlisted rule-class memory exists. Default false — empty memory is normal for new repos.

allowEmptyRules.description: Deprecated — use requireRuleClass (inverted). When false, equivalent to requireRuleClass:true.

playbooks.description: Confidence-scored playbook primary injection (PRD 064 R27-R28, R33).

models.description: Per-tier model map and role assignment. Policy tiers (cheap/build/mid/deep) map to concrete platform model IDs; agent frontmatter uses inherit or dispatch IDs only. Validated by scripts/model-tier-check.py.

tiers.description: Tier name → concrete model id (e.g. deep, build, mid, cheap).

aliases.description: Frontmatter alias → tier name (e.g. fast → cheap).

reviewer.description: Tier name for reviewer role floor.

routing.description: Semantic tier routing for sw-* commands and skills (not communication intensity).

agents.description: Agent or native-panel specialist id → semantic tier (no inherit).

communication.description: Task-gated caveman communication intensity for orchestration chat.

agents.description: Agent id → caveman intensity. Used after command/skill routing during delegated Task binding.

invariantsFile.description: Optional path to non-negotiable repo constraints surfaced to reviewers (ref-relative).

invariantsOptional.description: When true, missing/unreadable invariants on a ref logs override instead of blocking that review.

host.description: Git host/forge provider selection and API transport settings (PRD 026).

provider.description: Active host adapter id. Auto-detected from remote URL when omitted.

remote.description: Git remote name for host operations.

tokenEnv.description: Environment variable name holding the API token (never the secret value).

baseUrl.description: Optional web base URL for self-hosted instances.

apiBaseUrl.description: Optional REST API base URL override.

rateLimit.description: Shared rate-limit retry policy for host HTTP transport.

planningDir.description: Canonical planning-unit home (R5). Legacy prdsDir/tasksDir aliases retain docs/prds until migration cutover.

planning.description: Planning-unit guard, visibility profile, and inFlight signal settings (PRD 032/034).

inFlight.description: Committed inFlight tuple reconcile and staleness policy.

stalenessTtlHours.description: Auto-clear orphan tuples when branch is missing, run-id is absent from the registry, and porcelain deliver state is missing or older than this TTL (R4).

autonomy.description: Planning autonomy posture (PRD 035 R19): maintenance-only default runs mechanical bookkeeping autonomously and gates content decisions; full-conductor opt-in elevates gap/absorption-class decisions under bounded conductor limits. PRD 033 soft-enforces scheduler priority on explicit --task-list.

visibilityProfile.description: Repo-level default visibility profile when a unit omits visibility (PRD 034 R1). Public-repo-aware resolution may select all-private at init (R3).

privacyAck.description: First-run privacy acknowledgement for public remotes (PRD 034 R3).

required.description: True when a public origin remote requires ack before the first tracked spec commit.

ackedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the operator acknowledged the privacy notice.

releaseGrouping.description: Release/milestone grouping for issue-store planning units (PRD 045 R26/R71). Inert when backend != issue-store.

mode.description: Provider-native grouping when issue-milestone capability is present; flat-label fallback (label mode) when absent.

labelPrefix.description: Flat-label prefix for label-mode fallback when issue-milestone verb is unavailable (R71).

store.description: Planning unit body store backend selection (PRD 034 R5/R18).

backend.description: Active planning.store backend for unit bodies.

allowlist.description: Optional extra allowed roots beyond the operator home.

requestBudget.description: Per-provider derived-view request budget + cache TTL (PRD 046 R81/R93).

issuesProvider.description: Issue-backed planning provider when backend is issue-store (PRD 043).

projectKey.description: Namespaced planning project key for issue-store isolation (PRD 043 R42).

tokenEnv.description: Env var for issue-store token (distinct from host token).

fullConductor.description: Bounded full-conductor limits when planning.autonomy is full-conductor (PRD 035 R8/R23).

confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum proposal confidence before auto-deciding gap/absorption edges.

mutationBudget.description: Per-session autonomous graph mutation cap; halt + human resume when exhausted.

undoWindowSeconds.description: Reversible undo window before reconciler materializes an auto-decided absorption.

verifyMutation.description: Optional mutation-testing hook (contract-only; advisory by default).

enabled.description: When true, run scripts/verify_mutation.py after green (advisory).

provider.description: Provider id for documentation/telemetry; no built-in provider ships in PRD 039.

command.description: Shell command to run mutation tests (repo-defined).

excludeList.description: Paths or globs excluded from mutation (forwarded via SW_MUTATION_EXCLUDE).

quality.description: Structural-quality harness (PRD 039). Default none preserves loop behavior.

provider.description: Quality adapter id under providers/quality/<id>.py (none = no-op).

blockingTier.description: When change triage tier >= this value, a poor verdict blocks via check-gate (unset = advisory only).

rca.description: RCA fan-out settings (PRD 064 R1/R2). Default off — single-context loop unchanged.

enabled.description: When true, D5-gated multi-hypothesis fan-out may run; default false.

min_hypotheses.description: Fan-out when single-context pass yields fewer ranked hypotheses.

recurrence.description: Cross-run failure recurrence escalation (PRD 041 R22/R23). Unset = disabled (backward compatible).

threshold.description: Escalate when signature count >= threshold across >=2 distinct runs.

enabled.description: When false, escalation is disabled even if threshold is set.

inefficiency.description: Process inefficiency scanner (PRD 041 R25/R26). Default disabled.

enabled.description: When true, inefficiency scanner runs on deliver/retro surfaces.

slowTestSeconds.description: Flag per-test durations at or above this threshold (JUnit XML).

slowCiJobSeconds.description: Flag CI job durations at or above this threshold.

manualSteps.description: Manual commands excluded from repeated-step detection.

execute.description: Execute-tier sub-task orchestration (PRD 053 R32, R35). Default-on; escape hatch execute.enabled: false.

enabled.description: When true, multi-sub-task phases use execute-plan fan-out before sw-verify.

subBranchCeiling.description: Max concurrent execute sub-branches; null resolves to intraPhase.parallelBudget.

contextCompression.description: Task-dispatch context compression (PRD 058 gap-083 R26). Default off.

loopHealth.description: Downstream-cost diagnostic metrics (PRD 041 R29). Read-only — never gates merge.

tournament.description: Bounded tournament primitive (PRD 064 R5/R6). Default off.

enabled.description: When true, brainstorm divergence may run tournament selection.
